mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns show positive mean returns when FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden spike in the unemployment rate above 4.5 percent signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering short-term equity sell-offs within one week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 5-day returns remain positive in over 55 percent of instances when UNRATE exceeds 4.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60-day forward returns in at least 60 percent of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle indicates supply-side constraints that outweigh demand, forcing negative equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: Negative INDPRO monthly changes during tightening periods yield positive 20-day forward returns in more than half of the sample.

mechanism_narrative: Core inflation exceeding 3 percent forces immediate market repricing of future rate hikes, generating sharp negative equity returns within five trading days.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in over 50 percent of cases when CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth surpasses 3.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with falling unemployment rates confirms a robust labor market that supports corporate earnings and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Concurrent PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline fails to predict positive 60-day returns in at least 55 percent of historical observations.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts signal increased construction activity and consumer confidence, mechanically boosting equity valuations over the following month.
failure_condition: Positive HOUST levels consistently coincide with negative 20-day forward returns, or the signal Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all test periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial output during a post-shock recovery phase indicates rapid capacity utilization that immediately lifts equity prices within one week.
failure_condition: Strong positive INDPRO monthly changes during recovery phases fail to generate positive 5-day forward returns in more than 45 percent of cases.
